annotation_target.structure: Coda approach consequent — quiet, ornamented close
teaching_goals: the piece closes with the same ornamental grace it opened with
the final note of each phrase should ring softly
style_tips: pp — the nocturne ends in a whisper
let the final arpeggios of the LH fade naturally

teaching_notes.note: The quiet close — the cantabile melody ends in soft ornamental beauty.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 77–80 of Nocturne in Eb Major, Op. 9 No. 2 (continuation of mm. 73–76), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 77–80 and describe how this section concludes.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 77–80.
Measures 77–80 bring the phrase to a quiet, ornamented close — the melody settles softly. Let me loop mm. 77–80.
Chopin Nocturne mm. 77–80: quiet ornamented close. Pairs with mm. 73–76.

eval_metadata.split_strategy: stratified by (composer, composition_id) with MIDI byte-hash dedup
